name: Hawaiian Macadamia Coconut Squares
recipeInstructions:
DESCRIPTION: Macadamias and coconut top a brown-sugar coffee crust.
Preheat oven to 325°F. Butter a 9x13 baking pan.
CRUST:
1. Beat butter, 1 cup brown sugar, instant coffee powder, 1/4 tsp cinnamon, and 1/4 tsp salt together until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add flour, 1 cup at a time, until well blended.
3. Spread evenly in the buttered pan.
4. Bake for 20 minutes. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes.
PASTRY:
5. Beat eggs, vanilla extract, remaining 1 cup brown sugar, 1/4 tsp cinnamon, and 1/4 tsp salt together until smooth.
6. Stir in coconut and toasted macadamia nuts.
7. Spread evenly over the cooled baked crust layer.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until golden and firm to the touch.
9. Using a knife, loosen around edges while warm.
10. Cool completely on a rack.
11. Cut into 48 squares.
12. Store airtight for up to 1 week, freeze longer.
